economic_ownership_map.label: Steel mills through-cycle value

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results
2025 steel mills pretax earnings $2.383 billion

low.label: Through-cycle capitalization multiple on segment pretax per share
low.rationale: Converts filing segment pretax into per-share economic value after normalizing utilization, spread, maintenance capital, tax, and corporate allocation across a full steel cycle; not peak-2025 capitalization.

low.label: Steel mills through-cycle value per share

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results
2025 steel mills pretax earnings $2.383 billion

base.label: Through-cycle capitalization multiple on segment pretax per share
base.rationale: Converts filing segment pretax into per-share economic value after normalizing utilization, spread, maintenance capital, tax, and corporate allocation across a full steel cycle; not peak-2025 capitalization.

base.label: Steel mills through-cycle value per share

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results
2025 steel mills pretax earnings $2.383 billion

high.label: Through-cycle capitalization multiple on segment pretax per share
high.rationale: Converts filing segment pretax into per-share economic value after normalizing utilization, spread, maintenance capital, tax, and corporate allocation across a full steel cycle; not peak-2025 capitalization.

high.label: Steel mills through-cycle value per share

source_lineage.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results
2025 steel mills pretax earnings $2.383 billion

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025 segment and balance-sheet bridge via NUE/research/evidence_reconciliation_2026-07-15.json; proof base 110.0/sh via midcycle_capacity_value@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Normalize shipments, spread, utilization, maintenance capital, and tax across a full steel cycle rather than capitalizing 2025 or spot margins.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

source.locator: 230.9 million diluted shares in FY2025 results

low.label: West Virginia sheet mill net project cost

source.locator: West Virginia sheet mill expected to cost about $3.65 billion net of state commitment

low.label: West Virginia sheet mill annual capacity

source.locator: West Virginia sheet mill to provide about 3 million tons of annual capacity
2025 pre-operating and start-up costs approximately $496 million
Estimated 2026 capex $2.5 billion

low.label: Probability-weighted incremental value net of remaining spend and ramp losses
low.rationale: Credits only after-tax returns above the cost of capital on disclosed projects (West Virginia sheet, Kentucky plate ramp, Arizona melt shop, towers, coatings) after deducting remaining owner-funded spend not yet in normalized segment earnings.

low.label: Remaining project spend deducted inside the option proof
low.rationale: Owner-funded completion and ramp spend still ahead of mature utilization.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_ownership_map.label: Supply-response and downcycle reserve

source.locator: Steel-mill shipments 25.271 million tons in 2025
Steel-mill utilization 83% versus 76% in 2024

low.label: Explicit downcycle reserve for supply response and margin mean reversion
low.rationale: Deducts for domestic/global capacity additions, import pressure, and projects that may earn below their cost of capital; kept separate from normalized segment multiples to avoid double-counting cyclical risk.

source.locator: Steel-mill shipments 25.271 million tons in 2025

method_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Steel mills through-cycle value
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Normalize shipments, spread, utilization, maintenance capital, and tax across a full steel cycle rather than capitalizing 2025 or spot margins.

top_value_drivers.label: Downstream steel products
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Value downstream earnings separately using normalized backlog, margins, and maintenance capital.

top_value_drivers.label: New-project ramp and replacement-cost optionality
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Credit only probability-weighted after-tax cash returns above the cost of capital, net of remaining spend and ramp losses.

top_value_drivers.label: Raw materials and recycling
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Use through-cycle DRI, scrap, and brokerage economics after sustaining capital.

top_value_drivers.label: Supply-response and downcycle reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Explicitly deduct for margin mean reversion, supply response, and projects earning below their cost of capital.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Capacity, normalized margins, supply response, replacement cost, and low-case liquidity.
